create.title.description: Title of the single-gift creation dialog where a domain owner gifts a domain to one recipient.

create.submit.description: Primary submit button of the single-gift dialog that creates the gift.

multi.title.description: Title of the bulk gift dialog where a domain owner creates many gift reservations at once.

multi.bulkInputLabel.description: Label above the textarea where the user pastes multiple email/subdomain lines for bulk gifting.

multi.appendToTable.description: Button that parses the bulk text input and appends the rows to the editable entries table.

multi.addRow.description: Button that adds one empty row to the editable bulk-gift entries table.

multi.entriesCount.description: Heading above the bulk-gift entries table. {count} = number of rows currently in the table.

multi.entriesLabel.description: Inline summary showing how many entries are in the bulk-gift table. {count} = number of rows.

multi.tooltipParent.description: Help tooltip for parent (any-subdomain) bulk mode explaining the expected line format (email,count). Keep code samples and emails untranslated; preserve newlines.

multi.tooltipExact.description: Help tooltip for exact (specific-subdomain) bulk mode explaining the expected line format (email, subdomain). {domain} = the user's PBN domain — keep untranslated. Keep emails untranslated; preserve newlines.

multi.csvPlaceholderParent.description: Placeholder text for the bulk-input textarea in parent mode (one email per line). Keep example emails untranslated; preserve newlines.

multi.csvPlaceholderExact.description: Placeholder text for the bulk-input textarea in exact mode (email,subdomain per line). Keep example emails untranslated; preserve newlines.

multi.csvHintParent.description: Hint below the bulk-input textarea in parent mode describing the expected one-email-per-line format.

multi.csvHintExact.description: Hint below the bulk-input textarea in exact mode describing the email,exactName line format. Keep 'email,exactName' literal.

multi.sendEmailLabel.description: Label for the toggle that controls whether gift recipients are notified by email.

multi.sendEmailDescription.description: Helper text under the Send email toggle in the bulk-gift dialog.

multi.reserveDescription.description: Helper text under the Reserve toggle in the bulk-gift exact mode, explaining each name is held until received or expired.

multi.badgeParent.description: Compact badge labelling the current bulk mode as parent (any subdomain).

multi.badgeExact.description: Compact badge labelling the current bulk mode as exact (specific subdomain).

multi.duplicateBadge.description: Destructive badge showing how many duplicate rows exist. {count} = number of duplicates (ICU plural selects 'duplicate'/'duplicates').

multi.invalidBadge.description: Destructive badge showing how many invalid rows exist. {count} = number of invalid rows.

multi.createButton.description: Primary button that creates the bulk gifts. {count} = total number of gifts to create (ICU plural selects 'Gift'/'Gifts').

multi.validEmail.description: Inline validation error shown under a bulk-gift row when the email is invalid.

multi.duplicateRow.description: Inline validation error shown under a bulk-gift row that duplicates another row.

multi.countMin.description: Inline validation error shown when a bulk-gift parent-mode count is below 1.

multi.subdomainOf.description: Inline validation error when an exact-mode entry is not a single-label subdomain. {domain} = the PBN domain — keep untranslated.

multi.confirmTitle.description: Title of the confirmation dialog shown before creating bulk gifts.

multi.confirmDescription.description: Confirmation body before creating bulk gifts. {count} = total gifts (ICU plural selects 'gift'/'gifts'); the <b> tags bold the count.

multi.confirmCreate.description: Button in the confirmation dialog that finalizes creating the bulk gifts.

multi.back.description: Cancel/back button in the bulk-gift confirmation dialog that returns to editing.

multi.tagDuplicate.description: Small badge marking a row as a duplicate in the bulk-gift confirmation list.

multi.tagInvalid.description: Small badge marking a row as invalid in the bulk-gift confirmation list.

multi.tagMissing.description: Small badge marking a missing subdomain value in the bulk-gift confirmation list.

fields.yourDomain.description: Label for the select where the owner picks which of their PBN domains to gift from.

fields.yourDomainPlaceholder.description: Placeholder in the domain select prompting the user to choose an owned domain.

fields.yourDomainDescriptionFixed.description: Helper text shown under the domain select when the domain is preset and cannot be changed.

fields.yourDomainDescription.description: Helper text under the domain select explaining the user picks the PBN domain to gift from.

fields.recipientEmail.description: Label for the recipient email field in the single-gift dialog.

fields.recipientEmailPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example email in the recipient email field. Keep as an example email.

fields.recipientEmailDescription.description: Helper text under the recipient email field.

fields.recipientEmailRowPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example email in each bulk-gift table row email input. Keep as an example email.

fields.giftType.description: Label for the gift type select (specific domain vs any subdomain).

fields.giftTypeExact.description: Gift type option: gift one specific exact domain.

fields.giftTypeParent.description: Gift type option: let the recipient claim any subdomain.

fields.giftTypeDescription.description: Helper text under the gift type select explaining the two options.

fields.exactDomainName.description: Label for the exact domain name field when gifting one specific domain.

fields.exactDomainNamePlaceholder.description: Placeholder example subdomain in the exact domain field. {domain} = the PBN domain — keep untranslated.

fields.exactDomainNameDescription.description: Helper text under the exact domain name field.

fields.reserveLabel.description: Label for the toggle that reserves the exact domain while the gift is pending.

fields.reserveDescription.description: Helper text under the reserve toggle explaining the domain is held until the gift expires or is received.

fields.parentNote.description: Note shown in parent gift mode clarifying the parent domain equals the selected PBN domain.

fields.expirationDate.description: Label for the expiration date picker in the single-gift dialog.

fields.expirationDateDescription.description: Helper text under the expiration date picker.

fields.reason.description: Label for the optional reason field describing why the gift is being sent.

fields.reasonPlaceholder.description: Placeholder example text in the reason field.

fields.reasonDescription.description: Helper text under the reason field.

fields.personalMessage.description: Label for the optional personal message field included in the gift email.

fields.personalMessagePlaceholder.description: Placeholder text in the personal message textarea.

fields.personalMessageDescription.description: Helper text under the personal message field.

fields.mode.description: Label for the bulk-gift mode select (any subdomain vs specific subdomain).

fields.modeParent.description: Bulk-gift mode option: recipients can claim any subdomain.

fields.modeExact.description: Bulk-gift mode option: each recipient gets a specific subdomain.

fields.expiration.description: Label for the expiration date picker in the bulk-gift dialog.

fields.columnEmail.description: Column header for the recipient email in the bulk-gift entries table.

fields.columnCount.description: Column header for the per-recipient gift count in parent bulk mode.

fields.columnSubdomain.description: Column header for the specific subdomain in exact bulk mode.

toast.createdEmailSent.description: Success toast when a gift is created and the notification email was sent.

toast.createdEmailFailed.description: Warning toast when a gift is created but the notification email failed to send.

toast.createFailed.description: Error toast when gift creation fails. {error} = the error message — keep untranslated.

validation.invalidEmail.description: Form validation error when the recipient email is not a valid email address.

validation.exactRequired.description: Form validation error when the exact domain name is required but missing.

validation.exactMustEndWith.description: Form validation error when the exact domain does not end with the PBN domain. {domain} = the PBN domain — keep untranslated.

validation.parentRequired.description: Form validation error when the parent domain is required but missing.
